$comment: P9 lint-debt allowlist (plan/overhaul/README.md §4 rule 3; checked by scripts/lint-debt-ratchet.mjs, wired into ci.yml). Phase 0 baseline: 138 `as any` sites / 245 eslint-disable directives in production src/. Everything mechanically fixable was driven to zero in P9; THIS is the irreducible rest — every entry carries its justification. Counts may only DECREASE (run --update to lock improvements in); a new entry requires a reason reviewers accept. Vendored fork source (packages/*/src) is out of scope by the same diff-minimal policy as the eslint ignore block.

src/components/SmartLinkDialog.tsx.reason: react-hooks/exhaustive-deps: the GenAI mapping effect deliberately keys on [open] only — re-running on mappings/isLoading deltas would re-fire the paid GenAI call it guards.

src/components/reader/TTSQueue.tsx.reason: react-hooks/exhaustive-deps: follow-scroll effect intentionally tracks the active sentence index only; reacting to the full queue identity would scroll on every snapshot broadcast.

src/components/settings/DiagnosticsTab.t.reason: react-hooks/exhaustive-deps: the mount-only flight-recorder snapshot load is a deliberate one-shot read of a non-reactive source (the diagnostics repo).

src/data/schema.ts.reason: C1 migration registry (Phase 3 IDB v25): upgrade steps address LEGACY store names that no longer exist in the current TypedDB union by design — the registry replays history, so its store handles cannot be typed against the v25 schema. Shrinks only if idb ever types versioned schemas.

src/domains/library/import/extract.ts.reason: C8-sanctioned ingestion-side epubjs preamble (the ONE extractor; eslint carve-out names this file): epub.js's constructor/`book.loaded` surface is untyped upstream — the casts sit exactly on the vendor boundary.

src/domains/reader/engine/EpubJsEngine.t.reason: @typescript-eslint/no-this-alias: epub.js hook callbacks rebind `this`; the alias is the documented upstream pattern inside the sole sanctioned epubjs runtime importer (C7).

src/domains/reader/engine/epubTheming.ts.reason: C7 vendor boundary: `rendition.themes` is untyped in epub.js — the two casts wrap its private theme-registration surface inside the reader engine directory.

src/domains/reader/engine/offscreen/offs.reason: C7 vendor boundary (engine carve-out): the offscreen renderer walks epub.js spine/rendition internals (`spine.each`, `getContents()` array shape) that upstream leaves untyped.

src/hooks/useCfiCoordinates.ts.reason: react-hooks/exhaustive-deps: the hook takes a caller-supplied `...dependencies` spread the rule cannot statically verify — the disable is the documented cost of the variadic dependency contract.

src/store/useTTSSettingsStore.ts.reason: LegacyEnvelope.state is a parsed PRE-SCHEMA `tts-storage` persist blob (v1/v2/v3): its shapes predate typing and are pinned by the captured-blob fixtures (src/store/__fixtures__/ttsStorageFixtures); the migration chain is copied verbatim from the deleted store. Dies when the legacy key retires.
